title: The Silence Infection
description: An infection that's completely silent. Good luck.
body:
# THE SILENCE

CLICK [HERE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-silence-infection) FOR MORE FREQUENT UPDATES

The Silence is an infection mod, that's completely silent.



## GAMEPLAY:

When you spawn in, you'll have a start infection button. _Right-click_ this to start the infection at you position. Then, **run**.

Mobs touching the silent dirt will be converted into **disquieters**, which in turn convert more mobs. When you kill a **disquieter**, it'll leave behind a dangerous infection cloud that can convert more mobs.

Every now and then, **silencers** will spawn. These skeletal creatures are very dangerous, because the more they kill, the stronger they become. **_Kill them as fast as possible._**

You can craft **sonic tools** to fight the infection using iron and diamonds.

## GAMERULES:

The infection is fully customizable, and there are some things you can toggle:

**DoBulbGrowth** determines whether small pillars known as bulbs should generate.

**DoDisquieterTrail** determines whether disquieters should sometimes place silent dirt as they move.

**DoSilencerSpawning** determines whether silencers can spawn or not.

**DoForcefieldParticles** determines whether sonic forcefields create particles. (Disable if experiencing lag)

**InfectionSpeed** is how fast the infection spreads. (Default: 100, resets on re-log)

# ENJOY THE MOD!

[The Official x512 Texture Pack!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/x512-the-silence-infection-textures)
